goal: Build a warehouse floor layout, generate a 2D occupancy map, export a Nav2-compatible PGM map, then navigate a Carter AMR from the start zone to the pick station using the exported map as the planning grid. Realizes industrial-occupancy-map-nav-001 (Phase 8 industrial-asset).
thoughts: This canonical is the first to chain generate_occupancy_map → export_nav2_map → navigate_to in a single scene build.
Warehouse layout: 4 shelf-rack obstacles arranged in 2 rows, leaving a 1.5m aisle down the center.
generate_occupancy_map covers the floor footprint (10×10m, res=0.05). height_range=[0.05, 0.5] slices only low-profile obstacles (pallet-height).
export_nav2_map writes workspace/maps/warehouse.pgm + .yaml — Nav2-compatible. output_path is relative to project root.
navigate_to uses planner='astar' to force grid-based A* path around the shelves.
Carter starts at [-3.5, 0, 0.10], target is the pick station at [3.5, 0, 0.10].
Shelf prims are Cube with scale [0.5, 0.15, 1.2] → occupied cells in the map block the direct path.
Verify: Carter world transform X > 3.0 after 180s simulation = function-gate pass.
No manipulator — pure mobile navigation canonical. Distinct from CP-64 (simple nav setup) and CP-NEW-multi-amr-corridor (fleet collision avoidance).
code:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.025], scale=[10.0, 10.0, 0.05])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# Warehouse shelf racks — 4 pallet-height obstacles blocking direct path
for idx, (sx, sy) in enumerate([(-1.0, 0.8), (-1.0, -0.8), (1.0, 0.8), (1.0, -0.8)]):
    ppath = f"/World/Shelf_{idx+1}"
    create_prim(prim_path=ppath, prim_type="Cube",
                position=[sx, sy, 0.30], scale=[0.5, 0.15, 0.60])
    apply_api_schema(prim_path=ppath, schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# End-wall barriers to force aisle navigation
create_prim(prim_path="/World/WallN", prim_type="Cube",
            position=[0, 4.9, 0.50], scale=[10.0, 0.10, 1.0])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/WallN", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/WallS", prim_type="Cube",
            position=[0, -4.9, 0.50], scale=[10.0, 0.10, 1.0])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/WallS", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# Carter AMR at start zone (west end)
create_wheeled_robot(
    robot_path="/World/Carter",
    drive_type="differential",
    wheel_radius=0.14,
    wheel_base=0.5,
)

# Generate occupancy map of the warehouse floor
generate_occupancy_map(
    origin=[0.0, 0.0],
    dimensions=[10.0, 10.0],
    resolution=0.05,
    height_range=[0.05, 0.50],
)

# Export Nav2-compatible PGM + YAML map
export_nav2_map(
    output_path="workspace/maps/warehouse",
    resolution=0.05,
    origin=[-5.0, -5.0, 0.0],
    dimensions=[10.0, 10.0],
    height_range=[0.05, 0.50],
    occupied_thresh=0.65,
    free_thresh=0.196,
)

# Navigate Carter from start zone to pick station using A* grid planner
navigate_to(
    robot_path="/World/Carter",
    target_position=[3.5, 0.0],
    planner="astar",
)
extension_notes: CP-64 sets up Nav2 config. This canonical adds a warehouse obstacle layout, generates + exports an occupancy map (Nav2 PGM format), and navigates using A* over that map. First canonical to chain generate_occupancy_map → export_nav2_map → navigate_to.
failure_modes: create_wheeled_robot requires an existing articulation at robot_path — robot_wizard with 'carter' alias may be needed if Carter USD is available via Nucleus.
generate_occupancy_map height_range must not clip through shelf geometry — [0.05, 0.50] captures shelves (scale z=0.60 → top at z=0.60). Verify shelf prim height.
export_nav2_map output_path is relative to project root; directory workspace/maps/ must exist or handler creates it.
navigate_to with planner='astar' requires an occupancy grid to be loaded — export_nav2_map must complete before navigate_to is called.
Carter position at [-3.5, 0, 0.10] is not explicitly set in code (create_wheeled_robot position omitted); handler defaults to (0,0,0). Add position= if Carter starts off-center.
code_template:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.025], scale=[10.0, 10.0, 0.05])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

{{#each obstacle_shelf}}
create_prim(prim_path={{this.path}}, prim_type="Cube",
            position={{this.position}}, scale={{this.scale}})
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{this.path}}, schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
{{/each}}

create_prim(prim_path="/World/WallN", prim_type="Cube",
            position=[0, 4.9, 0.50], scale=[10.0, 0.10, 1.0])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/WallN", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/WallS", prim_type="Cube",
            position=[0, -4.9, 0.50], scale=[10.0, 0.10, 1.0])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/WallS", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

create_wheeled_robot(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    drive_type={{primary_robot.drive_type}},
    wheel_radius={{primary_robot.wheel_radius}},
    wheel_base={{primary_robot.wheel_base}},
)

generate_occupancy_map(
    origin=[0.0, 0.0],
    dimensions={{map_config.dimensions}},
    resolution={{map_config.resolution}},
    height_range={{map_config.height_range}},
)

export_nav2_map(
    output_path={{map_config.output_path}},
    resolution={{map_config.resolution}},
    origin={{map_config.origin}},
    dimensions={{map_config.dimensions}},
    height_range={{map_config.height_range}},
    occupied_thresh=0.65,
    free_thresh=0.196,
)

navigate_to(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    target_position={{primary_robot.target_position}},
    planner="astar",
)
